adv_data.kpi_details:
Name: WALMART INC.
Rating: 1.6
Number of Reviews: 161


Reviews:
	1. Name: Megan Ross | Rating: 1
Seems like this location or Walmarts in general has a thief or multiple thief’s! Literally stole all my money out of my account to make a purchase of 146 dollars!! I’ve never been to this state or location! I was in a Walmart in my state two days ago yet never used my debit card.  What do y’all have your employees walking around with scanners to steal your customers card information!! SPEND YOUR OWN DAMN MONEY NOT OTHER PEOPLES WHO HAVE TO WORK HARD FOR THEIRS!! Will not darken a door of Walmart for a long time and if I do it won’t be with my phone or cards again!

	2. Name: Robert Gaughan | Rating: 1
Everyone who is having money stolen dealing with Amazon because it’s funny the only company that has both my card numbers is Amazon. So is someone at Amazon sending our numbers to someone at this pharmacy. What is the problem with Walmart every review is that this store is using some one else’s debit card and they still allow it. Now my credit card was charged. Where are the police. Does Arkansas even have police.

	3. Name: Lucille Dixon | Rating: 1
My card information Was stolen. I live in Arizona and I've never been to this location! I'm not sure how they got my information the only thing I can think of is the fact that I recently ordered grocery pickup at the Walmart down the street from my house in California. I picked up my groceries no problem but the random charge occurred 3 days later.

	4. Name: cassandra del vega blanco | Rating: 1
At my old address, i didn't have a problem. When I moved, many items were either stolen or were never delivered. I can't walk J so I asked them to bring it to my door. It's a big apt. Complex. They'd leave it outside. I can't walk so I couldn't get the orders. Id have to have someone get it for me. A towel set I ordered, I never received. They sent it to another city. Also, 3 banks and 12 new cards, because someone at Walmart would get my card numbers and stole money. I was on the phone with my new bank and a charge popped up for $199.40.  They took my account saying I was committing fraud. A cop told me that walmart has been hacked, but the theft continues. I'm filing complaints because u did not commit fraud. I'd say they did.

	5. Name: Kay Robinson | Rating: 1
I’m not from Arkansas I live in Dallas Texas and somebody just tried to hit my EBT card on Monday but whoever did this has been up and down Houston Texas stealing off my card. I have to wait almost 30 days to replace my benefits. I don’t know what the heck is going on I don’t even use delivery, but this is crazy. I hope whoever is doing this gets caught.
